generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor embedded in each zone"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureTelemetry
]
instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Humidity sensor embedded in each zone"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityTelemetry
]
instance IlluminanceSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Illuminance sensor embedded in each zone"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IlluminanceTelemetry

    base:desc "CO₂ sensor embedded in each zone"

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy sensor embedded in each zone"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyTelemetry
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance TemperatureTelemetry : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]
instance HumidityTelemetry : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]
instance IlluminanceTelemetry : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IlluminanceSensor
]
instance CO2Telemetry : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CO2Sensor
]
instance OccupancyTelemetry : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMIFCModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM IFC model of the Living Lab building"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDETransformationTool
]
instance RuntimeConfigurationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Runtime configuration model generated by the MDE pipeline"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoConfigurator
]
instance ThermalDynamicsSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model for thermal dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TwinEngine
]
instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "JSON payload of temperature readings from sensors"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoBroker
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureTelemetry
]
instance HumidityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "JSON payload of humidity readings from sensors"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoBroker
    DTDFVocab:fromData HumidityTelemetry
]
instance IlluminanceData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "JSON payload of illuminance readings from sensors"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoBroker
    DTDFVocab:fromData IlluminanceTelemetry
]
instance CO2Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "JSON payload of CO₂ readings from sensors"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoBroker
    DTDFVocab:fromData CO2Telemetry
]
instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "JSON payload of occupancy readings from sensors"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoBroker
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyTelemetry
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHonoBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono MQTT broker routing sensor telemetry to Eclipse Ditto"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTransportService
]
instance EclipseDittoService : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto device twin service managing device twins"
    DTDFVocab:enables DeviceTwinService
]
instance UnrealEngine5Visualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 interactive visualization engine"
    DTDFVocab:enables Immersive3DVisualizationService
]
instance MDETransformationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MDE transformation tool converting enriched BIM into Ditto twin definitions"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelGenerationService
]
instance ModelValidationAPI : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Standard API for model validation with ~5% tolerance"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelValidationService
]
instance DittoConfigurator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Ditto Configurator for deploying twin definitions via Hono/Ditto"
    DTDFVocab:enables DeploymentService
]
instance TwinEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TwinEngine accessing Ditto registry and running runtime simulations"
    DTDFVocab:enables RuntimeSimulationService
]
instance BOREALIRLTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BOREALIS reinforcement learning tool refining control policies"
    DTDFVocab:enables ReinforcementLearningService
]

]

]

    base:desc "Reinforcement learning policy refinement in BOREALIS"

]

    base:desc "Lighting fixture actuator controlling individual lights"
]
instance HVACUnitActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT publishes control commands to Ditto device twins; these commands are transmitted via Hono to the building automation controllers, enabling remote actuation."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Data exchange occurs continuously with microsecond latency over MQTT; control loops run at ≈1‑second intervals; simulations run in real time matching the PT."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The constellation consists of a central twin orchestration service, a set of component twins, an MQTT broker, and a 3D visualization front‑end; all are interconnected via standardized JSON over HTTP/MQTT following the Ditto and Hono specifications."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers the design (BIM creation), construction (device configuration), commissioning (validation), operation (continuous monitoring and optimization), and eventual decommissioning of the building, thereby aligning with the physical counterpart’s lifecycle stages."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity assessed using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric; validation performed through model checks (e.g., IFC constraints) and sensor data consistency; uncertainty handled by sensor fusion and error bounds embedded in simulation models."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Physical devices communicate using MQTT over Hono, employing TLS 1.3; Ditto exposes both REST and MQTT endpoints; data payloads are JSON formatted; authentication occurs using X.509 certificates."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All components are containerised; Ditto and Hono run in Docker containers orchestrated by Kubernetes; Unreal Engine 5 deployment on a dedicated workstation or cloud instance; data storage utilizes PostgreSQL for persistence."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems such as enterprise BIM servers (Revit API), building control systems (BACnet), and third‑party analytics platforms via RESTful web services."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership resides with the building owner; DT provider stores anonymised aggregates; privacy compliance achieved via GDPR, encryption at rest and in transit, and selective data sharing policies."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Standards followed include IFC 4.3 for BIM, MQTT 3.1.1 for messaging, Ditto Open Connectivity Foundation specification, ISO 19650 for BIM asset management, and ISO 14001 for energy management frameworks."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security implemented with TLS 1.3, OAuth2 or client certificates for authentication, role‑based access control; safety measures include fail‑safe operation, runtime watchdog, and isolation of critical control paths to prevent accidental harm."
]
